thesis_summary: Long bias remains actionable only if the open absorbs the gap, holds the 28500 area, and reclaims VWAP by mid-morning.

checks.label: Opening posture holds above upper demand
checks.rationale: The long thesis needs the large overnight advance to avoid immediate acceptance back below the breakout base.

checks.label: Open prints dip then reclaim or controlled rotation
checks.rationale: Chasing a gap is lower quality; the forecast depends on absorption and reclaim, not pure continuation.

checks.label: First 30 minutes avoid deeper liquidation
checks.rationale: A break below 28450 would suggest the overnight markup is being sold, not absorbed.

checks.label: Mid-morning close above VWAP
checks.rationale: Reclaim-trend days require price to recover VWAP before lunch; otherwise the day becomes fade/balance.

checks.label: Price accepts above 28620 by noon
checks.rationale: Holding above 28620 confirms the morning dip was absorption and keeps upper-range close odds alive.
